casa_mia.name: Casa Mia
casa_mia.introduction: Welcome to Casa Mia Senior Living, a warm and welcoming community dedicated to providing exceptional care and enriching experiences for our residents. As a MEDIC Foundation volunteer, you play a vital role in brightening the lives of our senior community members through meaningful connections and engaging activities.
checklist: Complete volunteer orientation session
Review facility safety protocols and emergency procedures
Submit required screening documents
Familiarize yourself with resident activity preferences
Sign in at reception desk before each visit

resources.title: Volunteer Handbook
resources.description: Essential guidelines and best practices for volunteers

resources.title: Confidentiality Agreement
resources.description: Important information about maintaining resident privacy and confidentiality

resources.title: Tuberculosis (TB) Screening Form
resources.description: Required form for TB screening, which must be completed before volunteering

resources.title: Volunteer Waiver Form
resources.description: Legal document outlining the responsibilities and risks of volunteering

casa_mia.screeningInstructions: All volunteers must complete a criminal background check before their first visit. Please allow 5-7 business days for processing. Click the button below to begin the screening process.

pinegrove.name: Pinegrove Place

pinegrove.screeningInstructions: All volunteers must complete a criminal background check before their first visit. Please allow 5-7 business days for processing. Click the button below to begin the screening process.

point_grey.name: Point Grey Private Hospital
point_grey.introduction: Welcome to Point Grey Private Hospital, a prestigious facility committed to excellence in senior care. As a MEDIC Foundation volunteer, you join a team dedicated to enhancing the quality of life for our residents through compassionate service and engaging activities tailored to their unique needs and interests.
